metadata.study: State-Dependent Education Traps in Post-1985 Developing Democratizers
metadata.democratizer_criterion: v2x_regime reached >=2 (Electoral Democracy) after 1985, was <2 pre-1985, not OECD founding member

sources.education: UNDP HDR via OWID (mean years schooling, 1990-2023)
sources.economic: World Bank WDI (GDP/cap PPP, tertiary enrollment, GDP growth)

data_quality_notes.ilo_obs_status: ILO API response lacks OBS_STATUS; cannot filter directly-reported vs modelled estimates. Coverage 2009-2023 only; pre-2009 observations will be NaN.
data_quality_notes.swiid_ssa: Sub-Saharan Africa SWIID values are heavily imputed; use gini_disp_se>3 as unreliability threshold.
data_quality_notes.vdem_regime: v2x_regime rounding: 0=Closed Autocracy, 1=Electoral Autocracy, 2=Electoral Democracy, 3=Liberal Democracy (period averages are continuous).
data_quality_notes.dreher_imf: Dreher 2006 covers through 2019; 2020-2022 IMF data not included.
data_quality_notes.wb_year_format: WB WDI year column originally 'YR{year}'; converted to integer.

datasets.dataset: Education Trap Panel — Post-1985 Developing Democratizers (1990-2022)
